claim_boundary: S01E03 YouTube API upload and local thumbnail/comment tasks are completed for video ID 2P6fPs7NB0E. The upload helper initially reported private, and a later API check observed public + processed. The top-level comment was posted on retry with ID Ugw3CXuFnYeKOp4TNi54AaABAg. Thumbnail upload completed with maxres 1280x720 via thumbnails.set. Remaining blocked actions are pinning (manual/browser-only path), captions, playlists, analytics, Content ID, account edits, credentials in repo, and rights/platform-safety claims.

stages.title: Prompt packet
stages.scope: Draft and lock source prompts/metadata, no provider/media/release changes.

stages.title: Preview + issue-led review
stages.scope: Intake real media, detect risky segments, review + patch before any upload gate.

stages.title: Full render + thumbnail + comment prep
stages.scope: Create final candidate, thumbnail, and post-upload comment draft locally.

stages.title: Upload + schedule
stages.scope: Run approved upload and post-upload operations, then schedule release.
